---
# Affidavit-only render. Same content as test-warrant.qmd; just
# different `document-types` so only the affidavit pages are produced.
#
# Render with:  quarto render affidavit-only.qmd

format: warrant-vignette-typst
document-types:
  - affidavit

# ---- Jurisdiction (fixed) ----
state: Westbridge
county: Hartwell County
city: Northfield
court-name: Hartwell County Court
judicial-district: 4th Judicial District

# ---- Personnel (fixed) ----
clerk-name: M. Donovan
judge-name: Hon. R. Patterson
judge-title-full: County Judge — 4th Judicial District
detective-name: Detective J. Hayes
detective-badge: "#142"
detective-unit: Northfield Police Investigations Unit
detective-division: Northfield Police Division
detective-years: 22
notary-name: M. Reilly
notary-commission-exp: March 4, 2027

# ---- Per-case (variable) ----
case-number: CR24-087
case-id-barcode: 000087412D03
filed-date: AUG 12 2024
filed-time: "10:42"
warrant-time: "9:05"
warrant-period: DAYTIME

search-address: 419 W. Maple Avenue, Northfield, Hartwell County, Westbridge
property-description: |
  This is a two story house on the northeast corner of the intersection
  of W. Maple Ave. and 4th St. The porch and front door are on the
  south side of the residence.

suspect-names:
  - "[Suspect A]"
  - "[Suspect B]"

items-to-seize:
  - Electronic information devices such as computers, phones, electronic tablets.
  - External storage devices such as flash drives.
  - Medications which could be used for the purpose of [redacted].
  - Evidence of internet searches relating to [redacted].
  - Messages regarding the use of [redacted].

narrative-paragraphs:
  - "On 04-26-24 I began an investigation into the concerns that [Suspect B], age 17, had given birth prematurely to a stillborn child. [Suspect B] enacted the help of [Suspect A] and the two of them buried the child together. Both individuals were telling others they needed to dig the child's body up and then burn it."
  - "Over the next days I conducted interviews and obtained medical records. The medical records I obtained on 04-29-24 showed [Suspect B] had been pregnant on 03-08-24."
  - "On 04-29-24 I interviewed both [Suspect A] and [Suspect B] separately. The investigation continued through medical records, social-media records, and witness interviews."
  - "On 06-07-24 I obtained and served a search warrant to a social-media platform. On 06-09-24 I received the results, which included messages between the suspects discussing the purchase and use of [redacted]."
---
